overview.title: Consulting Services
overview.description: Strategic technology leadership, IT strategy, and hands-on team coaching for software organizations.

itStrategy.title: IT Strategy Consulting
itStrategy.description: Technology roadmaps, architecture decisions, and hands-on engineering leadership that align technology to business outcomes.

coaching.title: Team & Individual Coaching
coaching.description: Build a learning culture rooted in Extreme Programming and Lean principles. Coaching on code reviews, TDD, pair programming, and engineering practices.

hero.lede: Interim CTO, technical roadmap, or hands-on coaching. We bring 15+ years of engineering leadership to help teams ship faster with higher quality.

howWeHelp.heading: Two ways to work together.
howWeHelp.itStrategyBody: From technology roadmaps to acting CTO engagements. We align your engineering to business outcomes with clear goals, modern architecture, and data-driven decisions.
howWeHelp.coachingBody: Build a learning culture rooted in Extreme Programming and Lean. We coach teams and individuals on the practices that create high-performing engineering organizations.

cta.body: Book a 30-minute screening. We'll discuss your situation, share quick wins, and lay out a path forward.

hero.heading: IT Strategy
hero.lede: Technology roadmaps, architecture decisions, and hands-on leadership that align engineering to business outcomes.

whatWeDo.heading: A strategic technology partner, or an interim CTO.
whatWeDo.c1Body: Step in as acting CTO or engineering manager to provide immediate leadership. Draw the technical roadmap, implement it, and bring structure, velocity, and accountability.
whatWeDo.c2Body: Every engagement starts with clear goals and metrics. We align engineering to business outcomes so improvements directly translate to value — not just process changes.
whatWeDo.c3Body: Cloud, microservices, event-driven — the right tools for your context. Modernize development processes, optimize existing systems, and build what's missing to improve flow.

howWeWork.heading: Embedded, not bolted on.
howWeWork.body: We don't hand you a 100-page report and walk away. We embed with your team, implement alongside you, and transfer knowledge so you're self-sufficient when we leave.
howWeWork.step1Body: Understand your current state — codebase, team structure, delivery pipeline, pain points.
howWeWork.step2Body: Define a clear roadmap with milestones, metrics, and quick wins you can act on immediately.
howWeWork.step3Body: Roll up our sleeves and implement — architecture changes, tooling, process improvements, hiring guidance.
howWeWork.step4Body: Track progress against goals. Adjust the plan based on real data. Repeat until the transformation sticks.
howWeWork.area1: Technology stack evaluation and migration strategy
howWeWork.area2: CI/CD pipeline design and developer experience optimization
howWeWork.area3: AI integration strategy — identifying where AI delivers real ROI
howWeWork.area4: Internal developer platform design and implementation
howWeWork.area5: Team structure and organization (Conway's Law applied)

cta.body: A tailored 30-minute screening. We'll discuss your challenges, share quick wins, and lay out a roadmap tailored to your needs.

hero.heading: Team & Individual Coaching
hero.lede: Build a learning culture rooted in Extreme Programming and Lean. We coach teams and individuals on the practices that create high-performing engineering organizations.

philosophy.heading: Simplicity, feedback, continuous improvement.
philosophy.c1Body: Environments where every engineer grows through code reviews, brown-bags, and pair programming. Growth isn't a side effect — it's the system.
philosophy.c2Body: Delivering in small increments and tracking everything means teams see problems early and adapt quickly. Catches defects sooner, steers toward goals faster.
philosophy.c3Body: Ruthlessly eliminate waste — unused code, delays, unnecessary complexity. Waste is anything that interferes with giving customers what they really value.

whatWeCover.heading: Hands-on, practical, immediately useful.
whatWeCover.codeReviewBody: Transform reviews from gatekeeping into learning opportunities. Actionable, kind, and educational feedback.
whatWeCover.pairBody: Two minds, one keyboard. Spread knowledge, catch bugs earlier, build stronger teams.
whatWeCover.tddBody: Red-green-refactor. TDD as a design tool, not just a testing technique. Write better code by writing the test first.
whatWeCover.ciBody: Pipelines that give developers confidence. Automated testing, continuous deployment, issues caught in minutes, not days.
whatWeCover.dddBody: Align your code to your business. Bounded contexts, ubiquitous language, strategic design. Software that models reality.
whatWeCover.mentoringBody: One-on-one for developers levelling up. Architecture thinking, problem-solving, career growth, technical leadership.

coaching.quote: "Start where you are and incrementally make it better — transform your development process with proven engineering practices."

cta.body: Let's discuss your team's challenges and design a coaching engagement that creates lasting change.
